cxu_object.claim: The correct trading decision is to hold and do nothing approximately eighty percent of the time because most market movements are noise and acting on them destroys value through fees and whipsaws

supporting_contexts.text: Hold is correct 80% of the time. Most decisions should be do nothing. Signal consensus strategy producing only 2-3 trades per day achieved plus eleven dollars and sixty-two cents while scalp bands producing 20-30 trades per day lost negative thirty to negative eighty dollars.
Patience and selectivity beat frequency and cleverness. The regime-adaptive strategy with 30 lines of plain English policy beat complex matrix engines with sophisticated signal aggregation.

hierarchy.document_title: AgDel Trading Wiki — One Week Intensive Results

version.change_description: Initial axiom: hold-by-default principle from one week live trading analysis
